compute.cost_note: network-bound; published + granules pagination plus one HTM fetch per prepared statement

do_not_use_when: the source is not the GovInfo CHRG collection

inputs.target: GovInfo published service (collection CHRG) via the api.data.gov API

purpose: pull prepared written congressional testimony from GovInfo CHRG into the testimony_policy impostor pool (the population baseline argmove_profile profiles).
use_when: building the testimony_policy population baseline from public-domain CHRG prepared statements
